message: Hi! I'm Trajan with Platinum Plates, a DC/DMV brand with a strong car-scene following on TikTok and Instagram. Your precision machining and laser/marking work is seriously impressive. We're early-stage and just opening conversations with great local makers to explore working together. Down the line, would you ever be open to producing and shipping custom plates on-demand directly to our customers? We're local and would love to connect.

message: Hi Protolabs, we're Platinum Plates (Washington DC), selling custom durable license plates to a car-enthusiast audience. We'd like to produce custom metal plates on-demand from our designs. Could you confirm: material/finish options, durability, per-unit price + lead time, and whether there's any minimum? We'll order a sample first. Thanks!
emailSubject: Wholesale / Dropship Inquiry: Custom Laser-Cut Metal Plates for US Auto Brand
emailBody:
Hi Protolabs team,

I run Platinum Plates, a US-based custom plate brand with a strong social following in the Washington DC car scene (@platinumplates._ on TikTok and Instagram). I came across your sheet-metal laser-cutting service and was impressed by your precision laser-cut metal fabrication and fast turnaround, which looks like a great fit for durable custom plates. We're looking to source high-quality, durable custom metal plates to sell at volume to our audience, and want to understand your durability specs (material/gauge, finish, and weather resistance) for outdoor automotive use. Could you share whether you support wholesale or dropship arrangements, your minimum order quantity, and pricing tiers for repeat custom runs? I'd also love to get a sample produced and learn your typical lead time from approved artwork to shipment. Thanks in advance, and I'm happy to send over our design files to scope a first run.

Trajan — Platinum Plates
